response.overview: Nathalie: "I don't believe in higher powers. I believe that when you're dead, you're dead and then you rot in the sun like a putrid pig. That's why they bury people. I believe that man has no soul: you know this soul business is a lotta crap: it's all chemicals in your brain. That's all it is: fucking chemicals! I believe that it's fun to control people: people have no will power, they just follow the horde of people like a bunch of brainless cows. I believe that the end of the world is coming: that I'm gonna die, you're gonna die and there's no salvation. And we're all gonna die, that's right.
response.title: SexHibition 2
